hits.title: Critic can trigger replan
hits.snippet:
Critic can trigger replan
If retrieval-backed evidence is missing, critic should return revise and ask executor to补 retrieval evidence before judge finalizes.
critic revise replan memory retrieval

hits.title: Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence
hits.snippet:
Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence
Reviewers should expect workspace sandbox, tool runtime evidence, and tool-runs.json rather than only narrative claims.
sandbox tool runtime tool-runs.json evidence

args.content:
# Retrieval Addendum

## Query
provider registry runtime adapter workspace sandbox memory retrieval replan

## Hits
- [knowledgeBase] Provider registry should stay visible (score=8)
- [durableArtifacts] DELIVERABLE.md (score=6)
- [durableArtifacts] PLAN.md (score=6)
- [knowledgeBase] Critic can trigger replan (score=6)
- [knowledgeBase] Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence (score=6)

## Why This Matters
- provider registry should be visible in memory retrieval
- sandbox / tool runtime evidence should be retrievable
- lifecycle / shell injected tools should be observable
- judge should see retrieval-backed completion evidence

## Injected Tool Evidence
- lifecycle state => available
- shell state => missing

## Memory Retrieval
- [knowledgeBase] Provider registry should stay visible (score=8)
- [durableArtifacts] DELIVERABLE.md (score=6)
- [durableArtifacts] PLAN.md (score=6)
- [knowledgeBase] Critic can trigger replan (score=6)
- [knowledgeBase] Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence (score=6)
